description: CompositionLavender t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, screen print with brand name on the chest, puma Leaping cat logo below the nape of the neck and appliquéd brand name above the hemlineFitSlimWash careGentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degreesDo not bleachDo not tumble dryWarm ironDo not dry cleanGet ready to rock the show with this t-shirt from puma. The soft colour lends a soothing effect to your look, while the cut accentuates your feminity further. Pair it with slim denims and flipflops for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33"
